font_families.heading: Clash Display (Bold, geometrical, authoritative)
font_families.mono: Space Mono (For stats, credits, and data)

typography.rules: Never use Inter/Roboto for headings. Avoid centering text unless explicitly required for structural balance. Left-align for readability.

color_palette.usage_rules: No purple/violet gradients. The Saffron (Orange) and Green neons act as subtle Indian pride accents in a futuristic context. Use primary accent for CTAs. Use secondary for growth/credits indicators.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Asymmetrical Bento Grid. Avoid equal squares. Mix 2x2 spans with 1x1 spans. In React Native, achieve this with flex-wrap and percentage widths.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for main screen containers. Internal padding for cards must be p-4 or p-6 to avoid collision.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-aligned forms and dense data.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). High contrast text. Solid primary background for primary actions, 1px border for secondary.
components.cards: Razor-thin borders (1px) with solid or subtle glass background. No heavy drop shadows in dark mode. Use Expo BlurView for true glass effect.
components.digital_id: Futuristic ID Card: Glassmorphic background, glowing 1px border for Pro members, asymmetric layout for photo and QR code.
components.inputs: Flat surfaces with 1px bottom border or fully enclosed with 1px border. No default native styling.
components.splash_screen: Deep void background, IDEACON logo scaling up, glowing with Saffron/Green accents.
components.navigation: Bottom tabs with translucent blur overlay. Active tab indicated by a crisp neon dot or line, not a generic pill.

motion_interactions.general: Smooth, purposeful transitions. Reanimated or standard Animated for micro-interactions (e.g., scale down to 0.95 on press).
motion_interactions.lists: Staggered fade-in for Idea Pitch and Investor Discovery feeds.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over glass or images meets WCAG AA (4.5:1). Use text-shadow if needed over backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` (and `testID` for React Native support) attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-btn"`).

image_urls.description: Futuristic abstract dark texture for splash screen or Digital ID background.
Professional female avatar for Student/Future Founder profile.
Professional male avatar for Investor/Future Partner profile.
Modern tech startup office for growing startup portfolio cover image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop the app using standard React Native (.js). Use NativeWind or StyleSheet for styling according to these guidelines.
Implement both Light and Dark modes. Default to Dark Mode.
Ensure the KYC forms use crisp, bordered inputs and clear typography.
For the subscription Razorpay checkout, maintain the app's dark/light aesthetic in the surrounding UI.
Apply `data-testid` (and `testID`) attributes aggressively on all touchable elements, forms, and navigation buttons.
Keep layouts asymmetrical. Avoid centering everything. Use 1px borders for structure.
The admin analytics dashboard should use clear, dense grids (The 'Control Room' protocol).
